contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Sophia content-search capability — root-caused and fixed the 'email360 not in my context' failure
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/97
  
  Details:
  Gary asked Sophia to review 'email360'; she reported it nowhere in her context despite the term appearing 10+ times in agentic_ai_context/GROWTH_MODEL.md (Email360 retention loop) and in go_to_market's setup_newsletter_workbook_mirrors.py (Email 360 cross-reference tab in the newsletter analytics workbook). Root cause: Sophia had 38 tools but zero content-search capability — read_context_file needs a known path, list_directory lists filenames, and an existing search_codebase() function in github_tools.py was never registered as a ToolSpec (dead code). Fix shipped in truesight_autopilot: new search_context tool (case-insensitive content grep across the synced agentic_ai_context clone with file/line/snippet matches and per-file rollup), dormant GitHub code search registered as search_code (org-wide when repo omitted), new prompt rule 10 requiring search_context then search_code before ever claiming a governor's term is not in context (and stating what was searched), GROWTH_MODEL.md added to the key context-files list. Deployed to the Sophia box and verified live: the exact failing query resolves on-host (13 matches, GROWTH_MODEL.md top hit), service healthy. PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/97
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
